title: SR 11-15: Supervisory Letter SR 11-15 on         Disposal of Problem Assets through Exchanges  -- December 21, 2011
title_normalized: Supervisory Letter SR 11-15 on         Disposal of Problem Assets through Exchanges  -- December 21, 2011
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 11-15
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations: This letter applies to all state member banks, bank holding companies and their nonbank subsidiaries, and savings and loan holding companies that engage in asset exchange transactions, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK
bm25_text: SR 11-15 Supervisory Letter SR 11-15 on         Disposal of Problem Assets through Exchanges  -- December 21, 2011 to Community Banking Organizations: This letter applies to all state member banks, bank holding companies and their nonbank subsidiaries, and savings and loan holding companies that engage in asset exchange transactions, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets. BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF BANKING SUPERVISION AND REGULATION TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK SUBJECT: 1.  See http://www.federalreserve.gov/apps/contactus/feedback.aspx.  Return to text
